summary: Staff Software Architect & Engineering Lead with 20+ years of experience designing scalable, reliable systems and guiding cross-functional teams from initial planning to production release. A proven technical leader who combines high-level solution architecture, horizontal backend scaling, cloud/edge infrastructure, Linux server security, and modern AI agentic workflows—turning complex organizational requirements into clean, low-maintenance software that just works.

philosophy.title: First-Principles Architecture
philosophy.description: Evaluating technical solutions and system designs through logic-driven, scientific evaluation rather than industry hype or dogma.

philosophy.title: Cross-Functional Engineering Leadership
philosophy.description: Guiding teams from ambiguity to execution without ego—aligning product strategy, analytics, and engineering around reliable delivery.

philosophy.title: Low-Energy Maintenance
philosophy.description: Designing architectures with minimal moving parts, favoring zero-bloat static site generation and clean system boundaries over unnecessary complexity.

philosophy.title: Data Independence & Decentralization
philosophy.description: Decoupling data from proprietary vendor ecosystems, advocating for open protocols like Nostr and independent tools like Rclone.

highlights: Collaborated with the Growth team and diverse stakeholders, leading multiple engineering initiatives to optimize customer experience and top-of-the-funnel conversion across organizational boundaries.

Architected projects from initial first-principles planning through reliable production release across cloud stacks, including AWS Lambdas, AWS Gateways, user referral tracking systems, and Next.js static/incremental generation (SSG/ISR).
Partnered directly with product, marketing, lifecycle, and analytics leaders to define requirements and drive engineering execution while mentoring developers and improving CI/CD workflows.
Served as core platform backend contractor for a major U.S. financial services institution, guiding backend system design and scalability.
Engineered high-throughput, secure backend microservices using Node.js, AWS, Docker, Jenkins, PostgreSQL, and GraphQL.
Provided freelance software architecture, custom system development, and Linux security consulting across a 13-year span.
Executed Linux server provisioning, kernel hardening, automation scripting, and comprehensive vulnerability auditing.

Architected AWS scaling-on-demand backend APIs, executed complex database migrations (PostgreSQL, MySQL, MongoDB), and engineered custom web/mobile applications and interactive HTML5 Canvas/Unity tools.

"Like Plaid before there was Plaid": Designed and built solo the first horizontal-scaling backend platform to aggregate financial data across banks and financial services in Mexico, LatAm, US, and Crypto ecosystems.
Architected complete system fault redundancy, CI/CD tooling, Linux server configuration, and developer onboarding frameworks.
Built integrations for Mexican tax services (SAT), automated utility bill processing engines, and high-performance financial data pipelines.
Developed internal enterprise applications utilizing Perl and AJAX user interfaces to automate and monitor international VoIP networks.
Saved significant operational costs by creating an automated smart-recharging and dynamic routing engine for international voice traffic.
Provided top-level Linux system administration, kernel hardening, and security auditing across web hosting server clusters.
Responded to critical security vulnerabilities and diagnosed complex system performance bottlenecks.
